'''dhahuhu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ifrita|ifrita]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-h-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ifrita|ifrita]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| dhahuhu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæhihith|dhæhihith]] || [[word:dhæhihij|dhæhihij]] || [[word:dhæhihish|dhæhihish]] || [[word:dhæhihi|dhæhihi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhahuhuhuth|dhahuhuhuth]] || [[word:dhahuhuhuj|dhahuhuhuj]] || [[word:dhahuhuhush|dhahuhuhush]] || [[word:dhahuhuhu|dhahuhuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhahuhuth|dhahuhuth]] || [[word:dhahuhuj|dhahuhuj]] || [[word:dhahuhush|dhahuhush]] || [[word:dhahuhu|dhahuhu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhahufhuth|dhahufhuth]] || [[word:dhahufhuj|dhahufhuj]] || [[word:dhahufhush|dhahufhush]] || [[word:dhahufhuf|dhahufhuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhahuhuthu|dhahuhuthu]] || [[word:dhahuhuju|dhahuhuju]] || [[word:dhahuhushu|dhahuhushu]] || [[word:dhahuhuku|dhahuhuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhahuhuth|dhahuhuth]] || [[word:dhahuhuj|dhahuhuj]] || [[word:dhahuhush|dhahuhush]] || [[word:dhahuhu|dhahuhu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhahuhuthul|dhahuhuthul]] || [[word:dhahuhujul|dhahuhujul]] || [[word:dhahuhushul|dhahuhushul]] || [[word:dhahuhukul|dhahuhukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhahuhuthuthu|dhahuhuthuthu]] || [[word:dhahuhujuju|dhahuhujuju]] || [[word:dhahuhushushu|dhahuhushushu]] || [[word:dhahuhuku|dhahuhuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhahuhuthun|dhahuhuthun]] || [[word:dhahuhujun|dhahuhujun]] || [[word:dhahuhushun|dhahuhushun]] || [[word:dhahuhukun|dhahuhukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhahuhuthuoro|dhahuhuthuoro]] || [[word:dhahuhujuoro|dhahuhujuoro]] || [[word:dhahuhushuoro|dhahuhushuoro]] || [[word:dhahuhukuoro|dhahuhukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
